summary: Comprehensive forensic audit of BIQc platform (https://biqc.ai) for user Andre (andre@thestrategysquad.com.au). Tested every page, every sidebar section, all tabs on advisor page, soundboard AI, integrations connected tab, and more. Authentication via dynamically generated Supabase magic links (service role). Total 27 pages/sections tested with screenshots. CRITICAL FINDING: HubSpot CRM and Xero Accounting are NOT connected despite brief claiming they are — integration_accounts Supabase table has 0 records. Only Outlook Email (outlook) is connected. This explains 'CRM not connected' and 'Accounting not connected' on every page.

authentication_notes.method: Supabase Admin generate_link API with service role key
authentication_notes.magic_link_expiry: Single-use tokens, generated fresh for each test session

critical_integration_finding.finding: integration_accounts Supabase table has 0 records (count=0). HubSpot CRM and Xero Accounting are NOT connected for Andre's account.
confirmed_connected: Microsoft Outlook (email) — stored in email_connections table, connected 2026-03-11
NOT_connected: HubSpot CRM — NO record in integration_accounts
Xero Accounting — NO record in integration_accounts
critical_integration_finding.root_cause: MERGE_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE in backend .env — the real key is in Azure Key Vault and not available in this preview environment. Any Merge API call returns 503 'Integration service not configured'. The integration tokens described in the brief as being connected never got stored because the real Merge API key is not set.
critical_integration_finding.data_health_confirmation: Data Health page shows '1 Systems Connected, 1 data sources active' — only Email_outlook (95% healthy). No CRM or Accounting systems listed.

action_items: CRITICAL: The brief claimed HubSpot CRM and Xero Accounting are connected for Andre's account (user ebc01579-445b-4a15-b6f7-01156b6131b9) — BUT the integration_accounts Supabase table has 0 records. The MERGE_API_KEY is CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE. Please investigate: (1) Are these connections actually stored somewhere, or is the brief incorrect? (2) If real Merge API key is needed, inject it from Azure Key Vault. (3) If this is a migration issue, restore the integration records for Andre's Supabase user_id (9b13615a-b772-4b6c-a851-17bdddda9fdf).
HIGH: Fix War Room (/war-room) greeting template — shows 'Good , .' with empty name and time of day. The StrategicConsole component is not receiving/rendering user context.
HIGH: Fix Priority Inbox 401 errors — /api/email/outlook/priority returns 401 despite Outlook being connected in email_connections. Check Supabase JWT forwarding in the edge function call.
MEDIUM: Fix advisor page greeting — shows 'Good morning, there.' instead of 'Good morning, Andre.' — the owner/full_name is not being populated from snapshot or user profile.

MEDIUM: Fix Actions page (/actions) — incorrectly shows 'Email Integration Missing' despite Outlook being connected in email_connections table. The resolution queue detection logic is not checking email_connections.

LOW: Welcome Banner on advisor page should hide when at least one integration (Outlook) is connected — currently always shows because it checks connectedIntegrations from integration status, which only shows CRM/Accounting/Email categories.
INFO: Clearbit logo DNS errors on /integrations page are expected in sandbox environment — not a code bug.
INFO: For complete HubSpot/Xero testing, inject real MERGE_API_KEY and re-connect integrations for Andre's account.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: MERGE_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE means all Merge API integration connects fail with 503. This is a deployment configuration issue — the Azure Key Vault integration is not working in this preview environment.

BUG: War Room (/war-room) page — the strategic_console component shows 'Good , .' — template string substitution failing for both {firstName} and {timeOfDay}. Check StrategicConsole.js or war-room page for missing data props.

BUG: Email Inbox 401 error on /api/email/outlook/priority — the Supabase access token for the user is not being passed correctly to the edge function call. May need to check edge function auth header forwarding.

BUG: Actions resolution queue incorrectly flags email as missing. The detection logic in the backend needs to check email_connections table status, not just whether email appears in the integration_accounts table.
BUG: Greeting 'Good morning, there.' — the owner name from useSnapshotProgress() is returning empty string or null. The snapshot may not be storing the user's full_name.
POSITIVE: Board Room diagnosis works correctly — returns real AI-generated business content
POSITIVE: Calendar correctly shows real Outlook events
POSITIVE: Competitive Benchmark shows real web-scraped data (54/100 digital footprint)
POSITIVE: Soundboard AI responds correctly and doesn't fabricate data when integrations missing
POSITIVE: Data Health, Exposure Scan, Marketing Intelligence, Marketing Automation, A/B Testing all load and function correctly

NOTE: The 'user_id: ebc01579-...' in the brief is likely the old MongoDB internal user_id — the current Supabase auth ID for Andre is 9b13615a-b772-4b6c-a851-17bdddda9fdf. All Supabase table lookups use the Supabase auth ID, so any MongoDB-based ID in the brief is no longer relevant.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Testing environment: Production https://biqc.ai with real Supabase (vwwandhoydemcybltoxz.supabase.co). Auth: Use Supabase Admin API (service_role_key in backend/.env) to generate fresh magic links for andre@thestrategysquad.com.au. User Supabase ID: 9b13615a-b772-4b6c-a851-17bdddda9fdf. CRITICAL: HubSpot and Xero NOT connected — integration_accounts table has 0 records in Supabase. MERGE_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE blocks Merge API connections. Only Outlook email is connected (email_connections table). War Room page shows broken greeting 'Good , .'. Priority Inbox has 401 errors. All screenshots in /app/.screenshots/. 27+ pages tested and documented.

hubspot_xero_not_connected.root_cause: MERGE_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE in /app/backend/.env. The real Merge API key is in Azure Key Vault. In this preview environment, the key is not injected from Azure. The /api/integrations/merge/exchange-account-token endpoint returns HTTP 503 'Integration service not configured' when MERGE_API_KEY is CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE. Therefore, no HubSpot or Xero tokens were ever stored in integration_accounts (count=0). The brief's claim that these are connected is based on expectations, not actual database state.
hubspot_xero_not_connected.fix: Inject real MERGE_API_KEY from Azure Key Vault, or manually insert integration_accounts records with valid account_tokens for Andre's user_id (9b13615a-b772-4b6c-a851-17bdddda9fdf)

war_room_broken.root_cause: StrategicConsole (War Room) component has a greeting template 'Good {timeOfDay}, {firstName}.' where both variables are empty. The component either doesn't receive user context props or the snapshot data loading fails silently.

priority_inbox_401.root_cause: The Priority Inbox fetch (/api/email/outlook/priority or Supabase edge function email_priority) requires a valid user JWT session token. The 401 suggests the auth header is not being forwarded correctly or the edge function call doesn't include the session token.
priority_inbox_401.reproduction: Navigate to /email-inbox — console shows 401 error on priority inbox fetch

greeting_missing_name.root_cause: AdvisorWatchtower uses {owner || 'there'} where owner comes from useSnapshotProgress(). The snapshot either hasn't been generated for Andre or the owner field is not stored in the cognitive snapshot data.
greeting_missing_name.reproduction: Navigate to /advisor — shows 'Good morning, there.' instead of 'Good morning, Andre.'
